imageAlt: Dense emerald rainforest canopy shrouded in mist at dawn
lead: You are now part of The Forest Letter community.
body: Expect seasonal updates, botanical wisdom, and exclusive retreat offerings directly in your inbox. Your journey towards stillness begins here.

columns.title: Botanical Wisdom
columns.body: Each month, we share insights from our resident herbalists on the healing power of the Costa Rican jungle.

columns.title: Seasonal Rituals
columns.body: Discover the practices that align our retreat with the rhythms of the earth, from equinox meditations to tropical harvests.

columns.title: Exclusive Access
columns.body: Forest Letter members receive priority booking for our private seasonal sanctuaries and intimate wellness workshops.
